name: pantheon
description: Three-council audit protocol named after the divine assembly: athena (currently-active math + controls; wisdom + strategy), mnemosyne (historical math + control-theory founders + estimation classics; memory mother of muses), hephaestus (present-day engineering authorities; master craftsman). All three enforce the council-log protocol that reads notes/council-log.md before any audit and classifies every finding as NEW / RECURRING-UNFIXED / CONFLICT-WITH-PRIOR-SIGNOFF.
